title: What’s new in Gemma 4?
summary: Gemma 4 is a new family of open models from Google DeepMind supporting advanced reasoning, native vision and audio, and agentic tool-use capabilities. The models are designed to run across a wide range of hardware from high-end workstations to mobile phones.
